title: tabernaemontana oaxacana
intro: Tabernaemontana oaxacana is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Oaxacan yellow trumpet vine due to its vibrant yellow flowers that resemble trumpets. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana oaxacana include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine, including the treatment of wounds, burns, and respiratory issues.
